audit_events.event: Escalation workflow initiated with 5 active risk signal(s): Regulatory hold, Overdue invoice, Delayed shipment, Escalated support, Usage decline. Recovery team assigned.

customer_messages.body: We are proactively reaching out regarding your account. Our teams have identified concerns requiring immediate attention and have assigned a dedicated recovery team to work with you. Areas under active review include: Regulatory hold, Overdue invoice, Delayed shipment, Escalated support, Usage decline. A team member will be in contact shortly to outline next steps and ensure your success remains our priority. Thank you for your continued partnership.

workflow_state.status: At-risk escalation active with executive recovery owner routing and customer-visible audit history.
workflow_state.risk_summary: 5 signals: Regulatory hold, Overdue invoice, Delayed shipment, Escalated support, Usage decline
